global.title: service-subscription model tracks service-level subscription agreements
global.content:
# service-subscription model tracks service-level subscription agreements

`powerhouse/service-subscription` (12 ops) manages subscription agreements at the service level. Distinct from [[subscription-instance model tracks active customer subscriptions with lifecycle state]] which tracks individual customer instances.

## Cross-Model References

- ServiceOffering → ServiceSubscription (offering defines what can be subscribed to)
- May bridge between [[service-offering model defines tiered pricing with option groups and service groups]] and [[subscription-instance model tracks active customer subscriptions with lifecycle state]]

## Position in Ecosystem

Service & Pricing zone. Sits between the offering definition and the individual subscription instance — the agreement layer.

---

global.description: 12 operations — tracks service-level subscription agreements, distinct from instance-level tracking in SubscriptionInstance
